productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Printed Black Ties
description: Perfect for those casual meetings, this black tie with skull print from indigo nation exudes naughty fun. Team this with jeans, dress shirts and suede shoes for added style. Length: 153 cm Made of 100% handmade microfibre for durability and easy use Has skull print in silver that fades away towards the broad tongue Designed with a fading effect One loop with brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care only dry clean
